meta.title: Puppy Yoga in Calgary | Mixler
meta.description: Puppy yoga in Calgary combines a gentle yoga class with free-roaming puppies. It's as wonderful as it sounds and tickets sell out every single time.

content.subtitle: Downward dog, but make it literal. Puppy yoga in Calgary is everything.
content.intro: Puppy yoga is exactly what it sounds like: a yoga class where rescue or foster puppies roam freely around the room while you try your best to hold poses. Calgary's puppy yoga events sell out quickly because the combination of gentle movement, stress relief, and unbearable puppy cuteness hits something genuinely therapeutic. You don't need yoga experience, and you will leave smiling.

what_to_expect.heading: Free-roaming puppies throughout the class
what_to_expect.body: Puppies wander the room during the session. Some will climb on you, some will sleep on your mat, and some will demand your full attention at the worst possible moment.

what_to_expect.heading: Gentle, beginner-friendly yoga
what_to_expect.body: The yoga taught at puppy events is deliberately accessible. Instructors understand that concentration is harder than usual and keep the sequences light and forgiving.

what_to_expect.heading: Photo time before and after
what_to_expect.body: Most events build in time before the class and after for photos with the puppies. This is not optional. You will take photos.

what_to_expect.heading: Often supports rescue organizations
what_to_expect.body: Many Calgary puppy yoga events partner with local rescues or foster networks, meaning the puppies are looking for homes. Adoption happens more than you might expect.

tips: Book early. Puppy yoga events in Calgary regularly sell out days or weeks in advance.
Wear clothes you don't mind getting puppy paws and possibly puppy drool on. Your nicest activewear is the wrong choice here.
Don't eat right before the class. It's gentle yoga but a full stomach is uncomfortable, and you'll be moving around and possibly on the floor a lot.
Be gentle with the puppies and follow the handlers' guidance. Their comfort and safety is always the priority.
Mixler runs puppy yoga events in Calgary through our wellness event series. Join the waitlist and get notified before tickets drop.
content.waitlist_heading: Want to know when we run puppy yoga events?
content.waitlist_body: Join the waitlist and we'll email you when we add one. We use this to plan what to run next.

faq.q: Do I need yoga experience for puppy yoga?
faq.a: None at all. The yoga is designed to be easy and the puppies ensure no one is taking themselves too seriously. Total beginners are very welcome.

faq.q: Are the puppies from a rescue?
faq.a: Many Calgary puppy yoga events partner with local rescue organizations or foster homes. Check the specific event details for information on where the puppies come from.
A yoga mat if you have one, though many events provide them. Water, comfortable clothes, and your phone for photos are the essentials.

faq.q: Is puppy yoga suitable for people with allergies?
faq.a: That depends on your allergy severity. If you have dog allergies, a puppy yoga event may not be the right choice. Antihistamines help some people, but check with your doctor first.
